vibe_and_space: Tiny 进贤路 institution — handful of cramped tables, neighborhood regulars, no English menu, often a wait. Lunch is the easier window.
one_paragraph_recommendation: The textbook 'cheap and excellent neighborhood 本帮菜' option on the 进贤路 strip — Michelin Bib Gourmand for ~9 consecutive years, kept in 2026. Recommend for a solo Shanghainese lunch, a friend visiting who wants 'real local food, not a guidebook restaurant,' or any meal where 100-180¥/person makes sense. Cash-only-feel, no atmosphere, no reservation system — just walk in for an early lunch. Don't bring more than 3 people; the room is small.
